title: Trump approval above 45% by end of Q2?
thesis: Market has been climbing since the latest jobs report. Sentiment shifting faster than news cycle suggests.

title: Fed cuts rates before June 2026?
thesis: Market pricing in less than one cut. Powell's language has been consistently hawkish — crowd may be underreacting.

title: Labour wins with majority in 2024 UK election?
thesis: Polling momentum was undeniable. Markets were slow to price in the full extent of the Labour swing.

title: OKC Thunder win the 2026 NBA Championship?
thesis: Young core peaking at the right time. Regular season dominance often translates in the West.
